requirement_topic.en: ONPC Fire-Safety Review for BESS Installations

summary.en: The Office National de la Protection Civile (ONPC) is Côte d'Ivoire's civil-protection authority and public official material references fire-safety training, approved fire-safety and first-aid firms, and safety-certificate inspection activity for establishments open to the public. Decree No. 2023-1004 is reported to reinforce ONPC's institutional framework; where ICPE or local fire-certificate rules apply, project teams should confirm certificate scope, gas-detection expectations, renewal period such as a five-year cycle, and inspection route directly with ONPC or the permitting authority. BESS projects should expect local fire-safety review at site level, especially for containerized lithium batteries, indoor electrical rooms, public or industrial premises, and emergency-response planning.
summary.zh: 国家民防办公室（ONPC）是科特迪瓦民防主管机构，其官方公开材料提及消防安全培训、经认可的消防安全和急救机构，以及对公众开放场所的安全证书检查活动。据称第 2023-1004 号法令强化了 ONPC 的机构框架；在 ICPE 或当地消防证书规则适用时，项目团队应直接向 ONPC 或许可机关确认证书范围、气体探测要求、五年等换证周期以及检查路径。BESS项目应预期按场址接受当地消防安全审查，尤其是集装箱式锂电池、室内电气室、公共或工业场所和应急响应规划。
summary.zht: 國家民防辦公室（ONPC）是象牙海岸民防主管機構，其官方公開材料提及消防安全培訓、經認可的消防安全和急救機構，以及對公眾開放場所的安全證書檢查活動。據稱第 2023-1004 號法令強化了 ONPC 的機構框架；在 ICPE 或當地消防證書規則適用時，項目團隊應直接向 ONPC 或許可機關確認證書範圍、氣體探測要求、五年等換證週期以及檢查路徑。BESS項目應預期按場址接受當地消防安全審查，尤其是集裝箱式鋰電池、室內電氣室、公共或工業場所和應急響應規劃。

standards_or_laws: Reported Decree No. 2023-1004 concerning ONPC institutional framework
ICPE / local fire-safety certificate, gas-detection, and periodic inspection requirements where applicable
Local fire-safety certificate / inspection requirements where applicable
Project fire-protection design and emergency-response plan

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project fire-safety documentation for electrochemical energy storage. These documents may support technical due diligence but do not replace ONPC, local authority, insurer, or site-owner fire-safety acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防资料管理电化学储能安全。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代ONPC、地方主管机关、保险方或场址业主的消防安全接受。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防資料管理電化學儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代ONPC、地方主管機關、保險方或場址業主的消防安全接受。

gap.en: Prepare a French fire-safety dossier with site layout, separation distances, container ventilation, thermal-runaway mitigation, gas detection where relevant, fire detection and suppression design, emergency shutdown logic, firefighting access, SDS, and emergency response procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备法文消防安全档案，包括场址布置、间距、集装箱通风、热失控缓解、适用时的气体探测、火灾探测和灭火设计、紧急停机逻辑、消防通道、安全数据表和应急响应程序。
gap.zht: 應準備法文消防安全檔案，包括場址布置、間距、集裝箱通風、熱失控緩解、適用時的氣體探測、火災探測和滅火設計、緊急停機邏輯、消防通道、安全資料表和應急響應程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local fire-safety certificate, building/site permit, public/industrial premises inspection, insurer requirement, or project-owner approval applies; exact route is site-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on China project approval, GB 44240-2024 applicability, and local fire review

source.publisher: Office National de la Protection Civile (ONPC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Côte d'Ivoire BESS fire safety should be treated as a site-approval issue. China GB safety files are useful support but do not replace ONPC, local authority, insurer, or owner review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科特迪瓦BESS消防安全应作为场址批准事项处理。中国GB安全文件可作为有用支持，但不能替代ONPC、地方主管机关、保险方或业主审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 象牙海岸BESS消防安全應作為場址批准事項處理。中國GB安全文件可作為有用支持，但不能替代ONPC、地方主管機關、保險方或業主審查。
